summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification for 10 listed PRs using the provided cluster preflight artifact as live state. No GitHub mutations are planned; already-closed candidates are kept closed, the one security-sensitive candidate is routed to central security handling, and open PRs are kept as independent/related work because this shard has no shared canonical.
